phase_progress: C-005d CLUSTER COMPLETE on branch feat/memory-channels-to-store (PR #88), rebased onto main after upstream merge #87. C-005d.1: trusted-section apply path (TRUSTED_SECTION_KEYS). C-005d.2: memory + proactive_memory to store (+ json_to_toml_edit_value null-omit fix for Option round-trip). C-005d.3: sidecar_channels to store via in-memory upsert_sidecar_in_vec; secrets.env write + include-shadow guard unchanged; config.toml never written under surreal. All settings handlers (budget, memory, channels) now persist to the SurrealDB config store under read-only config.toml. Verified: overlay 17/17, config unit 18/18, sidecar unit 1/1, clippy + branding clean. No secret VALUE enters the store. Awaiting PR #88 review/merge.

next_action.description: C-005d (memory + channels settings migration) is code-complete on PR #88. After it merges, the phase-9 config-store migration is fully done (budget #84, memory+channels #88, MCP/default-model/config_set earlier). Run /kbd-reflect to close the phase.
